subcodes.title: Words to Albert Vail, spoken on 1919-11-19
subcodes.first_line: The City you deem most advisable is preferred by Me... Never associate with Mrs Kirchner... Be kind to them at first. Do not be severe at first. If you find they cannot be changed, leave them to themselves.
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @personal instructions
